prompt: Hi, I was charged $79 on March 1st for a plan I downgraded from in February. I have the confirmation email. This is the third billing issue in 6 months. Please fix this and explain what is happening.
reference_response:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for contacting us. We have reviewed your account and confirmed the erroneous charge of $79 on March 1st following your February downgrade. We sincerely apologize — this should not have happened.

A full refund of $79 has been initiated and will appear within 3–5 business days. We are also flagging your account for a billing audit to prevent further errors.

We deeply regret the repeated inconvenience and are committed to resolving this permanently.

Best regards,
Customer Support
